description: Ignite your local AI projects with Ignis, a tool designed for seamless implementation and efficient management of machine learning models.

An automated GEE-based framework for spatiotemporal surface water mapping (20162025) in the Awash River Basin, Ethiopia. Training and validation samples are automatically extracted from JRC-GSWD and Dynamic World datasets .

DETECTive: Automatic Test Pattern Prediction (ATPP) for Digital Circuits is a GNN and LSTM-based framework that predicts test patterns for stuck-at faults in gate-level circuits. By learning circuit topology and fault propagation paths, it enables fast and scalable ATPG without traditional backtracking.
